name: Palouse Soup Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Green split peas (16 oz pkg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Store in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
3. Stir before using.
To give as a gift, present these instructions on a nice card:
Combine 1 cup of soup mix with 4 cups of water or seasoned stock in a large pan. Add 1 cup of cooked chopped meat if desired. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and cover the pan. Simmer gently for 45 to 50 minutes, or until peas are tender. Add 1/2 teaspoon of salt if desired.
